notes: At first, Steam wouldn't even try to load the game. Turns out, I had to select a different game to force Steam into actually downloading Proton, then try again. The only game I could select that actually downloaded Proton 4.2-1 was Duke Nukem 3D: Megaton Edition. I'm curious why only this game seemed to actually download that specific version of Proton, but once it downloaded, I was able to run Disgaea 5, right out of the box, and was able to play with my Xbox 360 controller. I will play test more on the weekend.
